name: Divine Chicken:
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons sherry, salt and pepper to taste
1/2 cup grated Parmesan (or more if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook or sauté the chicken breasts until tender. Remove and debone.
2. Cook the broccoli and season lightly; drain and set aside.
3. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir in the flour, then add the chicken stock. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for about 5 minutes. Allow the sauce to cool slightly.
5. Beat in the egg yolks into the cooled sauce.
6. Whip the cream (not too stiff) and fold it into the sauce with the sherry.
7. Place broccoli in an oven-proof dish. Cover with half of the sauce and sprinkle grated cheese.
8. Arrange chicken over the cheese-covered broccoli, then cover with the remaining sauce and additional cheese if desired.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes, or until very hot. If desired, broil under high heat for 1 minute to brown at the end of cooking.
This dish can be made ahead as it freezes well.
